title: Article 89. Disrespect towards superior commissioned officer
doc_html:
§189.  Article 89.  Disrespect towards superior commissioned officer

Any person subject to this code who behaves with disrespect towards his superior commissioned officer shall be punished as a court-martial may direct.  

Acts 1974, No. 621, §1.
doc_text:
§189.  Article 89.  Disrespect towards superior commissioned officer
Any person subject to this code who behaves with disrespect towards his superior commissioned officer shall be punished as a court-martial may direct.
Acts 1974, No. 621, §1.
